{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322045856D90C9E1DC2D1E5402EEB"}"},"total":476},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7315773355885069092","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"成就值搞一个某音直播钓鱼视频直播卖货就成，有百万千万粉丝还怕没有成就值。卖鱼价格收费太乱了，收入帐目也不太清楚，自己全身家有多少钱也不知道"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1703337120,"group_id":"7288743342093896758","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1887205354898247"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7288743342093896758","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"52"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":26999,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":29974,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7315651498230579994","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一个渔夫主要是钓鱼赶海打鱼寻宝发家致富。这一本写悠闲一定会成功的。不要像上一本小说那样到了四百多章就变成俢仙和政治搞到一起。见过几本写悠闲钓鱼赶海有点小异能之类的小说，很成功。主打悠闲钓鱼出海打渔发家致富。看小说的大部分都是上班族工作压力大，喜欢看幽默悠闲轻松有点小异能类的小说。希望作者写作越来越好，小人物逆袭","text_exts":[{"e":19,"s":15,"text":"发家致富","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8F%91%E5%AE%B6%E8%87%B4%E5%AF%8C&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774126736E5402EEB%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227315651498230579994%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227288743342093896758%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8F%91%E5%AE%B6%E8%87%B4%E5%AF%8C%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1703309089,"group_id":"7288743342093896758","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N70//UzjzMuL5TNT6AgWlDvWoYyf2yhUOppJTenqtndJ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1887205354898247","user_name":"爱吃清蒸斑节虾的刘泰"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1887205354898247","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7288743342093896758","book_info":{"abstract":"【钓鱼+空间兑换+炫鱼+海岛生活】
